ExportArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ExportArn' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_imports and set ExportArn='{{ item.EndTime }}'

GlobalTableName.note: When dependent op needs 'GlobalTableName' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_global_tables and set GlobalTableName='{{ item.GlobalTableName }}'

ImportArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ImportArn' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_imports and set ImportArn='{{ item.CloudWatchLogGroupArn }}'

ResourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_tags_of_resource and set ResourceArn='{{ item.Key }}'

TableName.note: When dependent op needs 'TableName' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_backups and set TableName='{{ item.TableName }}'

BackupArn.note: When dependent op needs 'BackupArn' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_backups and set BackupArn='{{ item.BackupArn }}'

Key.note: When dependent op needs 'Key' param, use for_each=aws.dynamodb.list_backups and set Key='{{ item.Key }}'

DescribeBackup.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.BackupDescription.*

DescribeContinuousBackups.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ContinuousBackupsDescription.*

DescribeExport.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ExportDescription.*

DescribeGlobalTable.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.GlobalTableDescription.*

DescribeImport.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ImportTableDescription.*

DescribeLimits.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

DescribeTable.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Table.*

DescribeTableReplicaAutoScaling.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.TableAutoScalingDescription.*

DescribeTimeToLive.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.TimeToLiveDescription.*

GetItem.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.ConsumedCapacity.*

GetResourcePolicy.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly
